name: Farmers and Merchants Bank
description_short: Milligan's Farmers and Merchants Bank branch at 501 Main St provides local banking services.
description_long:
Farmers and Merchants Bank operates a branch at 501 Main St in downtown Milligan, NE. This standalone location serves the local Milligan community with full-service banking. Hours are not published online, so calling ahead is recommended.

The Milligan branch offers standard retail banking services including account opening, deposits, withdrawals, and consultation with banking advisors. Contact the branch directly to confirm specific service availability and current operating hours.

If you're a Milligan resident looking for convenient local banking, this downtown branch provides accessible service. Bring a valid ID for account transactions and financial services.
services: Personal checking accounts (Basic Checking and NOW Accounts)
Personal savings accounts (Regular Savings and Money Market Accounts)
Certificates of Deposit (CDs) with competitive rates
Personal loans and personal term loans
Digital banking (online and mobile app), CardValet debit card management, surcharge-free ATMs, and remote merchant capture
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Competitive CD rates (4.58% APY for 6-month, 4.11% for 12-month CDs) with low $500 minimums
Specialized agricultural lending products designed for farmers
Free online banking and mobile app for convenient account access
Surcharge-free ATM network included with accounts
CardValet debit card management and fraud protection tools
Accessibility-optimized website with AudioEye toolbar for users with disabilities
cons: Limited geographic footprint (only Milligan, NE and Cawker City, KS locations) restricts accessibility for most consumers
No information about minimum account balances or monthly fees provided on website
Limited branch network means fewer ATM locations compared to regional/national banks outside their service areas
No mention of investment services, wealth management, or retirement planning beyond basic IRAs
best_for: Farmers and agricultural business owners seeking specialized ag lending and rural banking services
Residents of Milligan, Nebraska and Cawker City, Kansas seeking local community bank relationships
Customers seeking FDIC-insured savings with competitive CD rates and low account minimums
Small business owners in the service area needing business checking, loans, and merchant services
diagnosis: Farmers & Merchants Bank is ideal for agricultural customers, farmers, and residents in Milligan, Nebraska or Cawker City, Kansas seeking FDIC-insured community banking with personalized service. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—this bank only serves two small rural communities, making it inaccessible for most consumers outside these areas.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Farmers and Merchants Bank at 501 Main St, Milligan, NE. Local banking branch with deposits, accounts, and financial services.
